critique.works_well: The full page demonstrates genuine product depth — feature sections, clear pricing, and UI previews all signal a real product with a real team behind it. Design consistency holds across the entire scroll, which is rare and impressive at seed stage. The information architecture follows a logical investor/user narrative: problem → solution → features → proof → price.
critique.looks_weak: Trust signals (logos, testimonials, metrics) are the weakest element even across the full page — if they exist, they are not prominent enough to register quickly. The pricing section, while confident, may be premature to expose this high in the funnel for a B2B sales-assisted motion. Some sections feel slightly template-adjacent in layout despite strong overall visual execution.
critique.single_biggest_improvement: Add a 'trusted by X teams at Y and Z' social proof band with real recognizable company logos — it is the only thing separating this from a 9/10 site.
